mission.title: Privacy First
mission.description: Your files never touch our servers. Your privacy isn't a feature — it's the foundation of Bam!.

mission.title: Zero Cloud
mission.description: No upload to remote servers. Data travels directly from browser to browser, with no intermediaries.

mission.title: P2P Revolution
mission.description: WebRTC enables native peer-to-peer connections in the browser. Bam! leverages this technology for direct and secure transfers.

steps.title: Select File
steps.description: Choose the file you want to share. No size limit, any format.

steps.title: P2P Connection
steps.description: Bam! generates a unique link. When the recipient opens it, a direct WebRTC connection is established.

steps.title: Secure Transfer
steps.description: The file is transferred with native end-to-end encryption. No intermediate server.

features.title: Direct Peer-to-Peer
features.description: Files travel directly from sender to recipient via WebRTC, without going through intermediary servers.

features.title: Native Encryption
features.description: Every transfer is protected by end-to-end encryption (DTLS 1.2+) integrated in the WebRTC protocol.

features.title: No Size Limit
features.description: Transfer files of any size. 64KB chunking ensures stability even with huge files.

features.title: Maximum Speed
features.description: Direct P2P connection without bottlenecks. Speed depends only on your connection.

features.title: Total Privacy
features.description: No file is ever uploaded to our servers. Zero access to your data.

features.title: Desktop App
features.description: Electron agent for persistent seeding, OS integration and native notifications.

roadmap.title: Burn-on-Read
roadmap.description: Self-destructing links that expire after the first completed download.

roadmap.title: Persistent Seeding
roadmap.description: Continuous sharing to allow multiple downloads from the same link.

roadmap.title: QR Quick-Share
roadmap.description: Dynamic QR codes for instant desktop-to-mobile transfers.

roadmap.title: Gamification
roadmap.description: XP system, levels and badges to reward active users.
